step_rationale: Lectin-pathway complement activation; elevated in AMI exosomes; links innate immunity to thrombosis.
mechanism: MASP1 activates the lectin-complement pathway, driving plaque inflammation and cross-talk with coagulation.

references.title: Proteomics Analysis of Five Potential Plasma-derived Exosomal Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
